name: publisher_tool
description: Generates fully self-contained styled HTML reports from structured content data. Automatically selects a visual theme based on subject matter (premium: ultraviolet, aurora, neobrutalism — standard: techno, classic, informative, contemporary, abstract, modern, colorful, tactical, editorial) and produces a single .html file with all CSS inline. Premium themes are preferred and receive double weight in auto-detection. Used by the Publisher agent for Tier 2 output — detailed reports, infographics, dashboards, and publication-quality documents.

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle or tagline shown below the title.

content.description: The full report content as structured Markdown or plain text. Include all sections, data, findings, and recommendations. The tool will convert this into the themed HTML layout.

theme.description: Visual theme for the report. 'auto' lets the tool infer the best theme from the content. Premium themes (ultraviolet, aurora, neobrutalism) are preferred for AI/dashboard/product content and are selected first by the auto-detector.

sections.description: Optional list of named sections with their content, for fine-grained layout control. Each item has 'heading' and 'body' fields.

metrics.description: Optional key metrics to display in a highlighted stats bar at the top of the report.

sources.description: Optional list of source URLs or references to include in the footer.

output_path.description: File path to save the generated HTML. Defaults to workspace/reports/YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_[slug].html

author.description: Optional author or organization name shown in the header/footer.
